logs.message: ResearchLms.Scheduling.Api depends on Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer (>= 10.0.0-preview.3.25171.6) but Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer 10.0.0-preview.3.25171.6 was not found. Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer 10.0.0-preview.3.25172.1 was resolved instead.
Package 'Newtonsoft.Json' 11.0.1 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-5crp-9r3c-p9vr
Package 'SQLitePCLRaw.lib.e_sqlite3' 2.1.11 has a known high severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2m69-gcr7-jv3q
